reviews.author: Ali Kanso
reviews.text: Best driving school in west london I really recommend them

reviews.author: Jawad Karrar
reviews.text: Bader was an excellent instructor. He taught me with confidence and clarity, without any hesitation. He was highly knowledgeable and skilled, and he made every lesson easy to understand. I truly appreciated his guidance and the quality of his instruction.Thanks to his teaching, I passed my driving test on the first attempt at the Pinner Test Centre. Many of my family members have also passed with him, and we are all very pleased with his instruction.

reviews.author: zahraa mahfouz
reviews.text: I can’t thank Bader enough for his support and guidance throughout my driving lessons. From day one, he was patient, encouraging, and incredibly professional. He explained everything clearly, helped me build confidence behind the wheel, and always made sure I understood what to focus on next.Thanks to his excellent teaching style and calm approach, I passed my driving test — something I was really nervous about at first! I highly recommend Bader to anyone learning to drive. Thank you so much for helping me achieve this — I’m truly grateful! 🚗✨

reviews.author: Fatimah Anwer
reviews.text: I had a really great experience with 360 Driving Academy. Bader and Habib were very patient and took the time to teach me how to be a safe and confident driver on the road. They explained everything clearly and made learning to drive feel comfortable and stress-free. I passed my driving test and now feel confident driving on my own. I really appreciate their help and would definitely recommend 360 Driving Academy to anyone learning how to drive.

reviews.author: Sanil P
reviews.text: Bader is an amazing instructor — passed first time with him. Definitely recommend to anyone looking to learn.

reviews.author: Tanya
reviews.text: Amazing instructor!! I feel completely confident to drive on my own — thank you!

reviews.author: Abdulla Alsalim
reviews.text: I highly recommend Bader, very professional and patient. Definitely bringing my family to him.

reviews.author: Tiff Jenkins
reviews.text: Bader was the best! I passed with 0 faults first time!! Thank you

reviews.author: Luna Hussain
reviews.text: Very excellent driving instructor — passed with 2 lessons only. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Ridha Jabbar
reviews.text: Habib was an amazing driving instructor — taught me the rules and safety. I recommend 100% to use 360 driving school.

reviews.author: Ahmad Almrdas
reviews.text: Great experience with them, passed first time with an amazing instructor Bader.

reviews.author: Ss Aa
reviews.text: Honestly i can’t thank my instructor enough, he was so nice and patient and helped through everything this is the best company to teach you everything from A to Z and you will definitely pass i passed first time and i’ve never driven a car in my whole life before my first lesson.

reviews.author: Abdallah Alshameri
reviews.text: Badr was an excellent driving instructor and I had only 7 lessons and he gave me top tips to drive safely and confidence.i had my test in Pinner with zero minor and 0 faults.Badr was very polite and professional always engaged with me and I had a mock test and passed my mock test he was very proud.

reviews.author: Mithun Mohanakumar
reviews.text: I can’t recommend BADER highly enough as a driving instructor! Thanks to his patience, clear guidance, and constant encouragement, I was able to pass my driving test with confidence.He explains everything in a calm and easy-to-understand way, which really helped me improve my skills and feel comfortable behind the wheel. Even when I was nervous, he stayed positive and supportive, making each lesson productive and stress-free.If you’re looking for a professional, reliable, and motivating instructor, BADER is definitely the one to choose. I’m so grateful for his help in helping me pass thank you again!I am disappointed in getting 1 minor as we always aim for 0 minor.
